title: Newly Renovated 3BD Period Home in Stratford
description: This charming and recently redesigned three-bedroom Victorian home is perfect for families, friends & business travellers alike! Set in a peaceful residential area, this space offers a relaxing retreat while keeping you well-connected. Stratford provides a lively mix of shopping, dining, and entertainment, with Westfield and the Queen Elizabeth Olympic Park just a short walk away. With direct access to Heathrow and Gatwick airports, enjoy excellent transport across central London (and beyond)!The space✦ 24/7 guest support✦ Professionally cleaned✦ Hotel-quality bed linen and towels✦ Wifi available ✦ Please be advised that this property operates on a fully self-catered basis. While certain amenities such as salt and pepper, cooking oil, and toiletries may be provided, their availability is not guaranteed and may vary between bookings.Recently refurbished and tastefully redecorated, this Victorian-era home blends classic charm with modern comfort. Nestled on a quiet street, the property boasts elegant wooden flooring throughout, a separate living and kitchen area, and a private garden patio—an inviting sanctuary after a day in the city.Kitchen:A bright and modern space, the kitchen features sleek white cabinetry, stylish black-and-white statement tiles, and warm wooden worktops. Fully equipped with everything you need, including an oven, hob, microwave, and dishwasher, it's perfect for cooking up a feast or preparing a quick breakfast. Enjoy views of the garden as you wash up, adding a touch of serenity to your routine.Living & Dining Room:The cosy yet stylish living room invites you to unwind, with a plush grey sofa adorned with cushions and a soft throw—ideal for snuggling up after a day of exploring London. A smart TV is mounted above the decorative fireplace, bringing a classic English home feel with a modern twist. The dining area features an elegant dark-wood table with bench seating, perfect for sharing home-cooked meals or indulging in a local takeaway.Bathroom:Located at the end of the kitchen, the family bathroom is designed for relaxation, featuring a bathtub with both a rainfall shower and a handheld attachment—perfect for either a quick refresh or a long soak. A heated towel rack adds a touch of luxury, ensuring warm, plush towels every time.First Bedroom (Ground Floor):This spacious ground-floor bedroom overlooks the quiet residential street, offering a peaceful retreat. It features a comfortable double bed dressed in hotel-quality linens for a restful night’s sleep, ample storage space, and tasteful artwork. A decorative fireplace adds to the room’s period charm.Second Bedroom (First Floor):Bright and welcoming, this first-floor bedroom features a cosy double bed with premium linens, a bedside lamp for evening reading, and a wardrobe for convenient storage. A large window overlooks the garden, filling the space with natural light. A full-length mirror ensures you can get ready with ease.Third Bedroom (First Floor):Spacious and airy, this bedroom is enhanced by elegant wooden floors and two large windows that flood the space with light. Another plush double bed ensures comfort, while a wardrobe allows you to settle in and make yourself at home. The addition of a desk and chair makes this an ideal space for remote work or catching up on emails.Garden:A rare gem in the city, the private garden is the perfect spot to enjoy a sunny afternoon. With comfortable outdoor seating, you can start your morning with a coffee, dine al fresco, or fire up the BBQ for a relaxed evening at home.This home is a fantastic base for exploring London, offering a peaceful escape while keeping you well-connected to the city’s top attractions. Westfield Stratford, the Queen Elizabeth Olympic Park, ABBA Arena, and other local highlights are all within walking distance. Whether you're here for business, leisure, or a mix of both, we look forward to welcoming you soon!Guest accessGuests have access to the full property during their stay. Enjoy!Other things to noteWe kindly request that you read the house rules prior to booking and respect them during your stay. Parties or events of any kind will not be tolerated. Violation of this rule will result in eviction from the property and charges for any damages or additional cleaning required. Thank you in advance for your cooperation!

title: Contemporary detached house short train to London
description: Our convenient and centrally located 3 double bedroom chalet style detached house is designed to be your home from home, ensuring you have everything you need for a long weekend getaway, a cosy family holiday or a peaceful base for business. Easy transport links into London, including a 15 minute fast train, perfect for a commuter or for trips into town. Venture further into the beautiful Garden of Kent, or stay local with village shops, restaurants, parks and pubs just a short walk away.The spaceThe house is located on a quiet street, just a short walk from the park, local bus and train stations, supermarket, hospital, excellent restaurants, busy cafes, cosy pubs and a kids play centre. The property has a driveway,  large enough to park two cars, and further free parking is available on the street right outside. On the ground floor you’ll find a porch where you can tidy away shoes and coats, a large open plan kitchen diner including a generous sized island with bar stools for evening drinks. The fully equipped kitchen has everything a budding chef would need to cook up a storm on the double range Smeg oven. In the summer you’ll be able to push back the bi-fold doors to the garden and enjoy the sunset at dinner. Outside in the private garden you can enjoy coffee and brunch on the patio, lazy days on the lawn and children can play on the generous swing and slide set, with no-one overlooking. Continuing through the house you’ll find a spacious lounge with a cosy corner sofa and an armchair to curl up on and watch a movie. Children’s books and toys are available to keep any little ones occupied while you relax with your feet up. You’ll also find a comfortable double bedroom and stylish shower room with wc to complete the ground floor. Upstairs is a peaceful master bedroom with a king size bed and built in wardrobes and drawers. There is another large double bedroom with huge amounts of storage, a convenient work space with a desk over looking the garden and a bright bathroom with shower cubicle, separate bath and wc.

title: Experience London in amazing reconverted Gin house
description:
Don't miss the opportunity to stay in a beautiful English Pub house located in Central London! 
Stay in a 1870's Victorian Gin House. The house retains many of it's original features, the building and facilities are to a very high standard.The spaceAn impressive 1,800Sq ft 3 bedroom 4 bathroom house.

Outside there is a lovely patio with a sunny aspect for outdoor dining.

On the first floor the stairs lead to a spacious open plan living and dining room. There are large comfortable sofas and chairs for guests to relax while they watch the wall-mounted Flat Screen TV, with cable channels and Bose music console. There is an extensive dining table in the dining area that seats 12 people comfortably. The professionally equipped stainless steel kitchen and stand-alone stove is complimented with in-cupboard dishwasher, washing machine, dryer and fridge freezer. The adjoining balcony overlooks the patio and there is a discrete guest bathroom on the same floor.

On the second floor there are two large double bedrooms: the Master bedroom with  Flat Screen TV, with cable channels and large en-suite wet room. The Second bedroom has an en-suite with bathtub and shower.

On the third floor there is a large double bedroom with en-suite bathroom, office desk with computer access and a large double hammock to relax.

You can hear the iconic sounds of Big Ben at night and have views of the London Eye from the top floors! 

The nearest supermarket can be reached on foot in 5 minutes and you also have a fantastic Italian Delicatessen offering fresh organic produce and a vegetarian restaurant just across the road.

The house is has an excellent central London location: 

SIGHTS: Just a 5 minute walk to the River Thames, then just a few minutes walk to Big Ben, Houses of Parliament, Westminster Abbey, London Eye and the Tate Britain art gallery! Only 4 stops from the busy shops of Oxford Circus and Regent street shops are only 3 stops away in Green Park.

FACILITIES: Just a 10 minute walk to Pimlico and Victoria, offering a vast array of shops, bars, cafe's and restaurants, food/farmers markets and supermarkets.

TRANSPORT: Just a 3 minute walk from Vauxhall tube station (London Underground Victoria Line-Zone 1, London Buses and a National Rail interchange station). There are direct bus links from Vauxhall station to many of London’s tourist attractions such as Tate Modern, Tower of London and the shops of Oxford Street.

BETTER THAN A HOTEL: You really have a lovely bedroom as in a hotel but with the use of a kitchen which helps keep costs down for breakfast, refreshments and meals AND a lovely living area space to relax and enjoy. You can also do your own laundry which is expensive in a hotel. You will find the house an oasis of tranquility after your busy day out. There is Sky TV, bring your laptop with you and use the internet (no daily charge like a hotel).

ACCESS & LAST MINUTE BOOKINGS: We usually live here, but the house is usually ready so we can often accommodate last minute requests. Your housekeeping charge covers the cost of the house being returned to its clean state for all our guests. 

CHECK IN & OUT times: We need at least 4 hours to get the house ready for you. However, if I don't have a back to back booking, then these can be flexible as I appreciate if you are flying in/out of London then you may want access at different times. Please email us to discuss - We can always arrange for you to drop off luggage in the morning and check in in the afternoon.

We look forward to welcome you soon!

You will have the entire house for yourselves!

We will personally welcome you and we always be minutes away on an email or text!

It's just a five-minute walk to the River Thames, then just a few minutes further to Big Ben, the Houses of Parliament, Westminster Abbey, the London Eye, and the Tate Britain. Oxford Circus and Regent Street's shops are just four tube stops away.

Download CITYMAPPER on your smart phone or tablet. It's the best tool to move around London! 
It will guide you to any destination you need to reach! 
Use the house address/postcode at the top of this page as your starting point.

CHECK IN from 3pm 
CHECK OUT by 11am

We agree to your ½ hour check-in slot according to your landing time allowing plenty of time for you to travel to the house. 
We can always accommodate changes in check-in time up to the day before your check-in date and will do our best to accommodate same-day changes. 
Please bear in mind that last-minute changes or if you fail to let us know your arrival time has changed will incur an extra £30 for every hour or fraction of an hour past the agreed arrival time. Please call, text or email when you are about to leave the airport.

description: My home is located in a wonderfully safe, family orientated area of London very close to the river Thames and the wonderful leafy area of Bishops Park. There are convenient grocery shops close by and transport is easy to the centre of town as there is a bus stop at the top of my street and 2 underground stations about 15/20 minutes walk away or 5 minutes by bus. This is a normal functioning family home most of the time so do be aware it comes with many personal items and 1 friendly pussy cats.The spaceThis beautifully spacious  5 bedroom town house offers a tranquil location but still very close to all the attractions of central London.  You will be sharing this space with my elderly pussy cat who will need feeding in my absence, I do hope you don't mind, but she is part of the furnishings and fittings! I have a very large garden by London standards which is available for dining and drinks and sunbathing. Any smokers can also enjoy this space as smoking is not permitted in the house.The master bedroom has an ensuite, the other 3 on the first floor share a bathroom and the 5th bedroom in the basement has a wet room, just down the corridor.  The neighbourhood is very quiet, the river and park is a stone throw away and I have no doubt, you will be super cosy and comfortable in a very well equipped, family home.Guest accessGuests will have access to the entire house with the exception of my dressing room and office which will be locked.Other things to noteAs an Airbnb Super host, comfort, cleanliness and guest satisfaction are high on my agenda so please always know I am at the end of a phone or email, should you require any assistance over the duration of your stay.Please be mindful of turning off all lights and electrical appliances when you leave the house and ensure all windows are closed too when you are out as this is a security risk. In addition when there is no one in the house, ensure the back doors to the garden are locked and the front door double locked on your departure.Finally please keep the cats in the kitchen throughout your stay.

description: A unique, three floor property tucked away in a Victorian mews in W1 London, with a private terrace, three bedrooms, twp bathrooms, and a small garage with laundry facilities. Situated between Marylebone and Fitzrovia, the property sits in a quiet mews, but at the same time within a five to 10 minute walk to many popular restaurants, bars, and tourist attractions, as well as Oxford Circus and Bond Street Underground stations providing access to the rest of the city.The spaceN10 is a very unique mews property over three floors, decorated with a mix of modern and vintage.- Ground Floor Open plan and including living and dining area, with a spacious and recently renovated kitchen. The kitchen comes with a large island, Rangemaster unit with five hobs, ovens, and a grill. There is also a microwave, fridge/freezer, kettle, coffee maker, pots/pans, dishes and more. The kitchen plug sockets include USB ports. The floor also features an original Victorian brick wall.LaundryThe washing machine is located in the garage which is accessible from the ground floor. Garage and Parking: Our garage will currently only fit a small car (please see the end for parking space measurements). There is paid parking nearby. Please note that we are inside London's Congestion Charge area. If you're unfamiliar with this please search for 'London Congestion Charge' or get in contact with us prior to your stay.- First FloorLiving Room:  The room has a warm feel and lovely daylight - here you have a cosy living room with TV, a music corner with vinyl player, and a dedicated workspace area. Bedroom 1: King Bed, wardrobe spaceBedroom 2: Double/Queen Bed, wardrobe spaceBathroom: Wet room/walk-in shower- Top FloorThis floor is also open plan, more modern and includes various areas. Bedroom 3: King Bed Bathroom 2: large shower, bathtubLiving Area: a modern seating area with 3 seater sofa, floor cushions, plus a fully equipped bar area to make your own cocktails. Private Terrace: spacious secluded terrace with six seater area.- Parking arrangementsThe garage can definitely fit a vehicle with the following dimensions. Only the driver side doors are usable when parking.Length: 413.5 cmWidth: 176.5 cmHeight: 157.0 cmFor any deviations above these measurements please get in contact if you require vehicle access to the garage.Guest accessThe entire mews is accessible. Entry on the ground level, there are two staircases which lead to the upper floors. Entry to the garage where laundry utilities are is also from the kitchen door next to the fridge on the ground floor.Other things to noteHouse Rules:No smoking inside the property or on the terrace. This is a fully non-smoking property. No large gatherings, no parties, no events. You are welcome to bring friends round for a quiet evening but please let us know in advance and don't go crazy!No unregistered guests allowed unless requested and approved.Please get in contact first if you would like to bring pets. Only small, well behaved pets are allowed and in some instances even the best behaved can get feisty in new environments.The property is in a very quiet and secluded area. The house itself is fairly well soundproofed, but please be as quiet as possible when entering or leaving the property during unsociable hours.Any breakages/damages must be reported and will be charged in full.Please no eating or drinking in the bedrooms beyond your bedtime water. You are welcome to eat on the terrace and in common areas, but please clean up after yourselves, especially on the terrace- we don't like ants!Turn off all lights and heating when out of the property.Turn off appliances after use, and please ensure all buttons on the stove are turned to 0.If you move anything, please put it back where it originally was.Please do the dishes. We always appreciate it when guests keep the place clean and tidy during their stay, and keep up with their dishes. You don't need to dry them, but if you could wash up and place them in the drying rack that would be great.If the place is left beyond reasonable condition, additional cleaning charges will be incurred as our cleaner will have to spend beyond their normal proposed time at the property.No illegal substances allowed on the premises.If you require cleaning of the property during your stay please let us know and we can arrange for our cleaner to visit. This will be at your own cost but will be far cheaper than another party and they know how and where everything should be!

Payment for this service is charged in advance of your stay through AirbnB.The Rules:We do keep the house in pristine condition,  and want our guests to enjoy the nicest environment. So we kindly ask you to never wear shoes inside. We provide free hotel-style slippers for all our guests for comfort. Our rugs, sofas, and carpets are professionally cleaned every 3 months.Chilled parties are allowed with due consideration to our neighbours.
